final:
// // This module calculates the quotient and remainder of two 2-bit numbers. If the divisor is zero, it sets the quotient to 2'b00 and the remainder to the dividend.
module divider_2bit (
    input [1:0] dividend,
    input [1:0] divisor,
    output reg [1:0] quotient,
    output reg [1:0] remainder
);
    
    always @(*) begin
        if (divisor == 2'b00) begin
            quotient = 2'b00; // Handle division by zero
            remainder = dividend; // Remainder is the dividend
        end else begin
            quotient = dividend / divisor;
            remainder = dividend % divisor;
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module calculates the quotient and remainder of two 2-bit numbers. If the divisor is zero, it sets the quotient to 2'b00 and the remainder to the dividend.
